statement: In every magma, Equation 797 (`x = y * (z * ((w * y) * y))`) implies Equation 142 (`x = y * ((z * z) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0826
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w y) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z z) x))
